hero.sub: Project Fusion keeps you in charge, your agents accelerate you to final frontiers.
modules.sub: Project Fusion is a modular AI operating system with useful tools and functionalities. Make it your system and tailor it to your needs.
preview.sub: Everything you need, nothing you don't. One workspace where you and your agents get things done.
harness.sub: The harness is the environment where an agent thinks, acts, and works safely. Every module builds on top — these blocks make it possible.
roadmap.sub: This timeline is indicative, not a promise. My current focus is a new full-time position. Project Fusion evolves alongside it.
cta.sub: Project Fusion shows my vision and capabilities. If I am the kind of problem solver your team needs, my profile is the logical next step.
cta.availability: AVAILABLE FROM {value} — OPEN TO NEW OPPORTUNITIES
